title: Traavis
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Traavis-CSWE.jpg]] |name=Traavis |homeworld=[[Skip 5]]{{InsiderCite|87|Order 66: Destroy All Jedi}} |birth= |death=[[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blond]]{{CWACite|4|Orders (comic story)}} |feathers= |eyes=Blue |skin=Light |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|There's General Traavis.''"
"''Wow! A real Jedi!?|RC-1013 and Evan|}} '''Traavis''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served as a [[Jedi General/Legends|general]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], during the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|sieges]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], Traavis led a campaign for five [[Standard month/Legends|months]] against the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]] of [[Monhudle]], [[New Bakstre]], and [[Biitu]]. Later in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]], he moved his [[Troop/Legends|troops]] to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]]. After [[Battle of Garqi (Clone Wars)|securing]] the planet, Traavis ordered the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Aiwha Squad]] to search for civilians and to take them to refugee camps. As he was inspecting the camps, the [[Squad/Legends|squad]] returned with an orphan named [[Evan]], whose parents were [[Death/Legends|killed]] during a skirmish between the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] and the Confederacy's [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. Traavis met with the boy and congratulated the squad for completing their mission. As the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] was speaking to the other commandos, Aiwha Squad's leader, [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]], received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], commanding all [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] to eliminate the Jedi. The clones immediately turned against Traavis and executed him. ==Biography== {{Quote|Commandos! Execute Order 66!|Sarge orders the Aiwha Squad to execute Traavis|}} Traavis, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was born during the final [[Time/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] on the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Skip 5]], located in the [[Smuggler's Run/Legends|Smuggler's Run]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]—the conflict between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]—Traavis served both the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the Republic as a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|general]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], during the Republic's [[Outer Rim Sieges/Legends|Outer Rim Sieges]], Traavis led a five-[[Standard month/Legends|month]] campaign against the [[Cassandran Worlds/Legends|Cassandran Worlds]] of [[Monhudle]], [[New Bakstre]], and [[Biitu]]. Later in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]], Traavis' forces [[Battle of Garqi (Clone Wars)|captured]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]], and the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Knight began to inspect the planet's overcrowded refugee camps. He ordered the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Aiwha Squad]] to search for civilians and to take them to the camps for protection. Traavis eventually received news that [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]], the [[Supreme Commander of the Droid Armies/Legends|Supreme Commander]] of the [[Separatist Droid Army/Legends|Separatist Droid Army]], had been [[Death/Legends|killed]]. [[File:Traavis-CWA4.jpg|thumb|left|Traavis inspects the refugee camps on Garqi.]] While Traavis was inspecting a refugee camp, Aiwha Squad's leader, [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]], reported on the mission's success. The commando also introduced the Jedi to a boy named [[Evan]], whose parents were killed during a skirmish between the Republic's [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] and the Separatist's [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. Traavis told Evan that they would get the orphan a bed in the refugee camp and some food. He commended the squad on their successful mission and informed them that Grievous was dead, stating that the war was likely nearing completion. However, as Traavis conferred with the other clones, RC-1013 received [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]] from [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], which [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|commanded]] them to eliminate the Jedi Knights as enemies of the Republic. Sarge immediately ordered Aiwha Squad to execute Traavis. The Jedi attempted to reach for his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to defend himself, but he was killed by the squad's [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] fire. The details of Traavis' death were filed in a report by Sarge shortly after Palpatine declared himself [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] of the first [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].{{Film|III}} The official records—which were modified by [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] [[Sate Pestage/Legends|Sate Pestage]] from a [[Casualty Report: Order 66|compilation of various reports]] created by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Marcellin Wessel]]—stated that Traavis was killed in the act of stealing children in order to indoctrinate them in the Jedi ways. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Sir, Aiwha Squad presenting one civilian refugee. Parents dead, sir.''"
"''Poor lad. Let's find a cot and get you some decent food.|RC-1013 and Traavis, regarding Evan|}} Traavis cared about the civilians who had been displaced on Garqi during the Clone Wars, inspecting the overcrowded refugee camps after capturing the planet. He was also willing to send the forces under his command to search for any surviving refugees. When he was introduced to Evan by RC-1013, Traavis tried to make sure the boy would be taken care of properly. After Aiwha Squad reported on the success of their mission, Traavis was pleased with their success and made sure that he congratulated the clones. He owned a lightsaber containing a [[Color/Legends|green]] [[Lightsaber crystal/Legends|crystal]]. ==Behind the scenes== Traavis first appeared in the short story "[[Orders (comic story)|Orders]]," which was written by [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] and drawn by [[Rick Lacy]]. "Orders" was one of four stories compiled in the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4|fourth volume]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|trade paperback]]. He was also featured in the article "[[Order 66: Destroy All Jedi]]," which was published in [[Star Wars Insider 87|''Star Wars Insider'' 87]]. In the article, an image of a live actor was provided for the character. Traavis later received an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''. Kaufman named Traavis after the author [[Karen Traviss]], who wrote the [[Republic Commando|''Star Wars: Republic Commando'']] series of novels.{{JCFCite|url=posts/22004315|board=Literature|thread=Clone Wars Adventures Volume 4 Discussion|user=[[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan_Kaufman]]|date=2005-10-19|time=11:13 AM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200801145615/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/clone-wars-adventures-volume-4-discussion.21403232/page-2}} ==Appearances== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Traavis}} *{{CWACite|4|Orders (comic story)}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|87|Order 66: Destroy All Jedi}} {{C|Incident Report #890-G}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Traavis |es=Traavis |fr=Traavis |nl=Traavis |pt=Traavis }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Generals]] [[Category:Jedi Purge victims]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Knights]] [[Category:Special Operations Brigade personnel]]
